title: Verify discount offer appears when user persists with cancellation
description: Test that continuing to cancel after Loss Aversion prompt shows the incentive offer with first month discount
preconditions: User has clicked Cancel Trial and seen Loss Aversion warning

steps.description: 3. On Loss Aversion popup, click 'Cancel Anyway'

expected_result: Discount offer popup appears with backend-controlled offer title and discounted price, with option to 'Grab Offer' or cancel anyway
